overall.description: A first-person walk along an urban waterfront promenade at sunset in a video game environment (resembling GTA V). The camera moves steadily from a covered area beneath a modern glass building with a distinctive metal canopy, past a burger restaurant, into an open waterfront area with dramatic orange skies and distant city skyline views.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered waterfront promenade beneath metal canopy structure

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered promenade beneath the metal canopy, passing by illuminated storefronts

notable_agents.action: person in white jacket and dark pants walking towards camera and passing by on the left side

entered.detail: intricate web-like metal canopy overhead extending from the modern building
tall contemporary glass and steel building with illuminated interior windows
low-rise commercial structure with illuminated 'BURGERS' signage
calm water surface reflecting the orange sunset sky
dramatic orange and red clouds against teal sky at dusk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a covered waterfront promenade beneath a distinctive web-like metal canopy attached to a modern glass building. The camera walks forward along the concrete path as pedestrians pass by in the opposite direction. The dramatic orange sunset sky is partially visible overhead, casting warm light across the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront promenade transitioning past commercial establishments

events.description: exits the covered metal canopy into the open waterfront promenade
passes the burger restaurant signage on the right, entering fully open waterfront area

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront promenade past commercial structures into more open space

notable_agents.action: person wearing orange hat and light-colored pants walking towards camera

entered.detail: silhouetted buildings and industrial structures visible across the water against the sunset
metal safety railing along the edge of the promenade separating walkway from water

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the covered area into an open waterfront promenade with full sky visibility. The modern glass building recedes into the background on the right while the distant city skyline becomes visible across the water. Pedestrians continue to pass by, including a person with a distinctive orange hat walking toward the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: expansive waterfront walkway with panoramic water and city views

events.description: tall street lamp with glowing light becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the open waterfront with expansive views of the water and distant illuminated skyline

notable_agents.action: person in white shirt with number 04 on back walking away from camera along the waterfront railing

entered.detail: tall modern street lamp with warm glowing light illuminating the promenade

segments.scene_description: The final segment features an expansive open waterfront with the modern building now far in the distance. The camera continues along the concrete promenade past a tall street lamp, with the distant city skyline prominently visible across the water. The dramatic orange sunset fills the sky as fewer pedestrians are encountered in this more open section of the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a sheltered urban walkway into an expansive, open waterfront promenade under a dramatic sunset. It begins beneath a distinctive web-like metal canopy attached to a modern glass building, where pedestrians pass by on a concrete path bathed in warm, orange light. As the camera emerges from the covered area, the glass building recedes to the right and the view opens up to reveal a distant city skyline across the water. The scene then expands further into a wide promenade, passing a tall street lamp as the orange sky becomes the dominant feature of the horizon. Finally, the camera continues its steady advance through the thinning crowd, leaving the architecture far behind to face the unobstructed vista of the city and the glowing sunset.
